intro: Caucalis grandiflora, also known as Large-flowered Cuckooflower or Wild Carrot, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the management of conditions such as arthritis and cancer.
